macro.title: Can the housing market still grow with mortgage rates over 6.64%?
macro.what: With rates near yearly highs and above 6.64%, purchase apps slipped 7% weekly and 2% yearly, but pending sales stayed ahead of 2025.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Higher mortgage rates push applications lower after holiday week
macro.what: MBA says applications fell as the 30-year fixed rate rose to 6.65%, while the refinance index increased 4% and purchases fell 7%.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates to Fall as Cooler-Than-Expected Inflation Report Lowers Odds of a July Fed Rate Hike
